label: NetAlertX
info: CARD-0063 — translates NetAlertX's raw system-sensors/# MQTT firehose (~95 msgs/scan) into new-device alerts on jctsh/components/netalertx/log, plus a 5-minute heartbeat on jctsh/components/netalertx/heartbeat (picked up automatically by the watchdog flow's jctsh/+/+/heartbeat wildcard). CARD-0068 removed online/offline presence transition messages — noisy, not actionable, no future use identified.

name: New-device detection (diff against cached is_new flag — no mirroring)
fn_device_info (cache scan stats, detect new-device)
fn_heartbeat (build log + heartbeat payloads)
